contract_meta.rationale: Phase 2B integrates clarification into user flow: prompt augmentation, execute integration, UI form, end-to-end wiring. This is UI-heavy work - known danger zone requiring strict governance.
contract_meta.danger_zone_acknowledgment: UI integration historically triggers scope creep and 'just one more tweak' behavior. Strict win isolation enforced.

project.name: executor-mvp
project.goal: Complete clarification flow: augment prompts with answers, integrate into execute flow, build UI form, wire end-to-end. User can ask for code, see questions, answer them, get better generation.
project.estimated_time: 4-6 wins over 1-2 weeks at sustainable pace
out_of_scope: Advanced form validation beyond required fields

execution_model.description: Agent verifies Phase 2A completion, then builds UI integration incrementally. STRICT win isolation - each win must be complete and demoed before next.

scope_creep_triggers: Adding field validation beyond required/type checking
Modifying existing UI outside clarification flow
Adding features not in win specification

observability.description: Continues 2025 agent observability pillars with enhanced UI event tracking

tasks.title: Verify Phase 2A + Observability Fix completion
tasks.description: Confirm Phase 2A backend and observability fixes are complete before starting Phase 2B

evaluation.intent: Verify Phase 2A + observability complete before starting UI work
evaluation.success_criteria: All Phase 2A artifacts exist, observability files present, tests pass
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Phase 2A and observability must be complete before Phase 2B

tasks.title: Win #14: Prompt Augmentation Logic
tasks.description: Create augmentPrompt function that merges original prompt with clarification answers into complete prompt

content_spec.function_signature: export function augmentPrompt(originalPrompt: string, clarifications: ClarificationResponse): string
content_spec.behavior: Take original prompt + answers array, format as context prepended to prompt
content_spec.format_example: Framework: FastAPI, Port: 8000, Database: PostgreSQL\n\nOriginal request: build me an API
edge_cases: No clarifications: return original prompt unchanged
Empty answers array: return original prompt unchanged
Missing answer values: skip that question in output

test_cases: missing answer value - skips that question

success_criteria: Function correctly merges prompt and answers
Output format is clear and readable

demo_requirement.manual_test: Call augmentPrompt with sample data, verify output format makes sense
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer confirms augmented prompts look good before proceeding

tasks.title: Win #15: Integrate Clarification into Execute Flow
tasks.description: Modify /api/execute to accept optional clarifications and use augmented prompt for generation

ensure: Accept request body: {prompt: string, clarifications?: ClarificationResponse}
If clarifications present, validate against schema
If clarifications present, call augmentPrompt
Use augmented prompt for LLM generation
Return response includes: {generated, clarificationsUsed: boolean}

test_cases: execute without clarifications - works as before
execute with valid clarifications - uses augmented prompt
execute with invalid clarifications - returns 400 error
augmented prompt passed to LLM (verify via mock)
existing execute flow unchanged when no clarifications

success_criteria: Backward compatibility maintained (no clarifications still works)
All tests pass including existing ones

demo_requirement.manual_test: POST to /api/execute with clarifications via curl/Postman, verify it works
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer confirms backend integration works before UI

tasks.title: Win #16: UI Clarification Form
tasks.description: Add UI form to display questions and collect answers. FUNCTIONAL ONLY - no styling polish.

ui_scope_limits.styling: Basic CSS for readability only. No colors, animations, or polish.
ui_scope_limits.validation: Required field checking only. No advanced validation.
ui_scope_limits.features: Display questions, collect answers, submit button. Nothing else.
forbidden: Any features not explicitly in win description
Modifications to existing UI outside clarification

ensure: Add <div id='clarificationSection'> after prompt textarea
Add <form id='clarificationForm'> (initially hidden)
Add container for dynamically rendered questions
Add 'Answer Questions' button
Add 'Skip Questions' button
Basic CSS for form layout (functional only)
After user submits prompt, call /api/clarify
If questions returned, show clarificationSection
Render questions based on type: text inputs, number inputs, radio buttons for choices
Collect answers on 'Answer Questions' click
Store originalPrompt and answers in memory
On 'Skip Questions' click, use original prompt only
Maintain existing execute flow logic

success_criteria: Clarification section appears when questions exist
Questions render correctly based on type
Layout is functional (doesn't need to be pretty)
No JavaScript errors in browser console

demo_requirement.manual_test: Open UI, enter incomplete prompt, verify questions appear, fill form, verify answers collected
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer AND wife review UI - confirm functional, confirm no scope creep
scope_creep_check: Did you add styling beyond basic layout?
Did you add features not in win spec?
Did you modify existing UI outside clarification?
Can you stop now without 'just one more thing'?

mandatory_break_after.rationale: UI work complete. Step away. Assess before continuing to Win #17.

tasks.title: MANDATORY CHECKPOINT: Assess before Win #17
tasks.description: Required pause after UI work. Consult with wife before proceeding to end-to-end wiring.

questions: Any signs of scope creep or 'just one more tweak' thinking?
Energy level adequate for full-stack wiring?
Wife approval to continue today, or better to start Win #17 tomorrow?

decision_points.continue_today: If all assessments positive and wife approves, proceed to W17
decision_points.stop_for_today: If any concerns or fatigue, STOP. Tag current state, resume tomorrow.
decision_points.on_scope_creep_detected: HALT Phase 2B. Review what was added beyond spec. Remove or document for Phase 2C.

tasks.title: Win #17: Connect UI Question Flow to Execute
tasks.description: Wire UI form submission to /api/execute with both prompt and answers. Complete the full flow.

ensure: On 'Answer Questions' click, collect form answers
Format answers as ClarificationResponse
Submit to /api/execute with {prompt: originalPrompt, clarifications: answers}
Display loading state during generation
Show results same as existing execute flow
Handle errors gracefully (invalid answers, network errors)

success_criteria: Full flow works: prompt → questions → answers → generation
Skip flow works: prompt → generation (no questions)

demo_requirement.manual_test: Complete end-to-end flow multiple times with different prompts
test_scenarios: Complete prompt (no questions) - should work as before
Incomplete prompt (with questions) - should show form, collect answers, generate
Skip questions - should use original prompt
demo_requirement.approval_needed: Developer AND wife review full flow - confirm it works, confirm Phase 2B scope complete

tasks.title: Phase 2B validation gate
tasks.description: Final validation that Phase 2B UI integration is complete before declaring phase done

actions.test_complete_flow: Incomplete prompt → questions appear → fill answers → generate with augmented context
actions.test_skip_flow: Incomplete prompt → questions appear → skip → generate with original prompt
actions.test_no_questions_flow: Complete prompt → no questions → generate normally

evaluation.intent: Confirm Phase 2B UI integration is production-ready
evaluation.success_criteria: All tests pass, all flows work end-to-end, no scope creep detected, governance checkpoints passed
evaluation.on_pass: Phase 2B COMPLETE - Ready for Phase 2C decision (telemetry + smart defaults)
evaluation.on_fail: HALT - Fix issues before declaring 2B complete

win_isolation.description: Each win must be complete, tested, and DEMOED before proceeding to next
win_isolation.implementation: Run tests after each win. Manual demo required for W14-W17. Halt if demo fails or scope creep detected.

CHECKPOINT.on_fail: STOP Phase 2B. Do not proceed to W17 without explicit approval.

P2B-GATE.on_fail: HALT execution. Do not proceed to Phase 2C.
P2B-GATE.report: Generate diagnostic showing which validations failed.

ui_danger_zone_protocol.enforcement: Strict scope limits on W16 and W17. No features beyond spec. No styling beyond functional.
ui_danger_zone_protocol.mandatory_breaks: 30-minute break after W16. Checkpoint approval required before W17.
ui_danger_zone_protocol.scope_creep_detection: If any forbidden additions detected, HALT and remediate before continuing.

fallback_policies.phase2a_verification_fails: HALT - Phase 2A must be complete before 2B.
fallback_policies.test_fails: Fix implementation, do not skip tests.
fallback_policies.scope_creep_detected: HALT. Remove additions or document for Phase 2C. Do not proceed until clean.
fallback_policies.checkpoint_not_approved: STOP for day. Resume W17 next session.
fallback_policies.coverage_drops: Add tests to maintain >80% coverage before proceeding.
fallback_policies.ui_breaks_existing_functionality: HALT. Revert UI changes. Isolate clarification better.

release_actions.cmd: git commit -m "feat(phase2b): complete clarification UI integration - prompt augmentation, execute flow, form, end-to-end wiring"

ai_executor_guidelines.observability_first: Trace all decisions. Log reasoning for each win completion.
ai_executor_guidelines.win_isolation: Complete and demo each win fully before proceeding to next. Do not mix wins.
ai_executor_guidelines.ui_danger_zone: W16 and W17 are UI-heavy. Strict scope enforcement. No additions beyond spec.
ai_executor_guidelines.mandatory_demos: W14-W17 require manual demos and approval before proceeding.
ai_executor_guidelines.checkpoint_enforcement: CHECKPOINT after W16 is mandatory. Cannot proceed to W17 without explicit pass.
ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Write tests for W14 and W15. Backend tests must cover clarification integration.
ai_executor_guidelines.fail_fast: If any test fails, halt and fix before proceeding.
ai_executor_guidelines.gate_enforcement: P2B-GATE must pass before declaring phase complete.
ai_executor_guidelines.scope_creep_vigilance: Any additions beyond win specifications must be flagged and removed or deferred to Phase 2C.

governance_note.for_human: Phase 2B is UI integration - your acknowledged danger zone. The contract includes CHECKPOINT after W16 requiring wife approval before W17. Strict scope limits on UI work. Mandatory demos after each win. Take breaks. If at any point you feel the urge to add 'just one more thing' - STOP. That's the scope creep trigger. Phase 2C exists for enhancements.
